summary: Iteration 334 - Konekt B2B Platform feature testing. All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend UI verified: Dashboard with Profit KPI, Settings Hub tabs (Countries & Markets, Document Numbering), Statement of Account page, Customer Profile with Credit Terms section.

issues: Dashboard may appear blank briefly on initial navigation to /admin/dashboard - works correctly when navigating via sidebar or to /admin directly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this session verified working: 1) Dashboard KPIs include profit_month field and revenue_trend includes profit line. 2) Order status update correctly rejects sales role with 403. 3) Request-status endpoint creates status_request documents. 4) Credit terms PUT endpoint updates customer credit terms. 5) Customer 360 detail returns credit_terms fields. 6) Settings Hub Countries & Markets tab shows TZ, KE, UG config. 7) Document Numbering tab shows prefix/digits config for QT, IN, ORD, DN, PO, SKU. 8) Statement of Account page loads with search and branded view toggle.

features_verified.dashboard_profit_kpi: PASSED - Profit (Month) KPI card visible showing TZS -3,823
features_verified.dashboard_revenue_profit_chart: PASSED - Revenue & Profit Trend (6 months) chart shows both lines
features_verified.settings_hub_countries_tab: PASSED - Countries & Markets tab shows Tanzania (TZ), Kenya (KE), Uganda (UG) with currencies, VAT rates, phone prefixes
features_verified.settings_hub_doc_numbering_tab: PASSED - Document Numbering tab shows config for Quote (QT), Invoice (IN), Order (ORD), Delivery Note (DN), Purchase Order (PO), SKU
features_verified.order_status_sales_restriction: PASSED - PATCH /api/admin/orders-ops/{id}/status returns 403 for sales role
features_verified.customer_360_credit_terms_fields: PASSED - GET /api/admin/customers-360/{id} returns credit_terms_enabled, payment_term_type, payment_term_days, payment_term_label, credit_limit
features_verified.statement_page_loads: PASSED - Statement of Account page loads with customer email search and Load Statement button
features_verified.customer_profile_credit_section: PASSED - Customer Profile shows Payment & Credit Terms section with toggle, term type, payment days, credit limit, and Admin Only badge
